creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!
I can't reproduce this.  How are you starting xscreensaver?  I'm
starting it at the same time X starts, using my .xinitrc.  Do you have
any special settings in your xorg.conf or xscreensaver's config, that
makes it more verbose or the like?
Regards!
-- 
Niclas Zeising
